metadata.significance: Mentions many prophets and their missions, emphasizes unity of message

ayahs.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ ٱقْتَرَبَ لِلنَّاسِ حِسَابُهُمْ وَهُمْ فِى غَفْلَةٍ مُّعْرِضُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Iqtaraba lilnnasi hisabuhum wahum fee ghaflatin muAAridoona

translations.en_sahih: [The time of] their account has approached for the people, while they are in heedlessness turning away.
translations.en_yusufali: Closer and closer to mankind comes their Reckoning: yet they heed not and they turn away.
translations.ms_basmeih: Telah hampir datangnya kepada manusia hari perhitungan amalnya sedang mereka dalam kelalaian, tidak hiraukan persediaan baginya.

ayahs.arabic: مَا يَأْتِيهِم مِّن ذِكْرٍ مِّن رَّبِّهِم مُّحْدَثٍ إِلَّا ٱسْتَمَعُوهُ وَهُمْ يَلْعَبُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Ma yateehim min thikrin min rabbihim muhdathin illa istamaAAoohu wahum yalAAaboona

translations.en_sahih: No mention comes to them anew from their Lord except that they listen to it while they are at play
translations.en_yusufali: Never comes (aught) to them of a renewed Message from their Lord, but they listen to it as in jest,-
translations.ms_basmeih: Tidak datang kepada mereka itu sebarang peringatan yang diturunkan dari Tuhan mereka lepas satu: satu, melainkan mereka memasang telinga mendengarnya sambil mereka mempermain-mainkannya -

ayahs.arabic: لَاهِيَةً قُلُوبُهُمْ ۗ وَأَسَرُّوا۟ ٱلنَّجْوَى ٱلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُوا۟ هَلْ هَـٰذَآ إِلَّا بَشَرٌ مِّثْلُكُمْ ۖ أَفَتَأْتُونَ ٱلسِّحْرَ وَأَنتُمْ تُبْصِرُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Lahiyatan quloobuhum waasarroo alnnajwa allatheena thalamoo hal hatha illa basharun mithlukum afatatoona alssihra waantum tubsiroona

translations.en_sahih: With their hearts distracted. And those who do wrong conceal their private conversation, [saying], "Is this [Prophet] except a human being like you? So would you approach magic while you are aware [of it]?"
translations.en_yusufali: Their hearts toying as with trifles. The wrong-doers conceal their private counsels, (saying), "Is this (one) more than a man like yourselves? Will ye go to witchcraft with your eyes open?"
translations.ms_basmeih: Dengan keadaan hati mereka leka daripada memahami dan mengamalkan maksudnya. Dan orang-orang yang zalim itu, berbisik-bisik sesama sendiri dengan berkata: "Bukankah (Muhammad) ini hanyalah seorang manusia biasa seperti kamu? Maka patutkah kamu turut hadir mendengar sihir yang dibawanya itu sedang kamu nampak dan mengetahui karutnya?"

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ رَبِّى يَعْلَمُ ٱلْقَوْلَ فِى ٱلسَّمَآءِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۖ وَهُوَ ٱلسَّمِيعُ ٱلْعَلِيمُ
ayahs.transliteration: Qala rabbee yaAAlamu alqawla fee alssamai waalardi wahuwa alssameeAAu alAAaleemu

translations.en_sahih: The Prophet said, "My Lord knows whatever is said throughout the heaven and earth, and He is the Hearing, the Knowing."
translations.en_yusufali: Say: "My Lord knoweth (every) word (spoken) in the heavens and on earth: He is the One that heareth and knoweth (all things)."
translations.ms_basmeih: (Bagi menjawab mereka, Nabi Muhammad) berkata: "Tuhanku mengetahui tiap-tiap perkataan (yang dilahirkan atau disembunyikan oleh makhluk-makhluk) di langit dan di bumi; dan Dia lah jua yang Maha Mendengar, lagi Maha Mengetahui".

ayahs.arabic: بَلْ قَالُوٓا۟ أَضْغَـٰثُ أَحْلَـٰمٍۭ بَلِ ٱفْتَرَىٰهُ بَلْ هُوَ شَاعِرٌ فَلْيَأْتِنَا بِـَٔايَةٍ كَمَآ أُرْسِلَ ٱلْأَوَّلُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Bal qaloo adghathu ahlamin bali iftarahu bal huwa shaAAirun falyatina biayatin kama orsila alawwaloona

translations.en_sahih: But they say, "[The revelation is but] a mixture of false dreams; rather, he has invented it; rather, he is a poet. So let him bring us a sign just as the previous [messengers] were sent [with miracles]."
translations.en_yusufali: "Nay," they say, "(these are) medleys of dream! - Nay, He forged it! - Nay, He is (but) a poet! Let him then bring us a Sign like the ones that were sent to (Prophets) of old!"
translations.ms_basmeih: (Mereka bukan sahaja menyifatkan Al-Quran itu sihir) bahkan mereka menuduh dengan berkata: "Al-Quran itu perkara karut yang dimimpikan oleh Muhammad, bahkan perkara yang diada-adakan olehnya, bahkan Muhammad sendiri seorang penyair. (Kalaulah ia sebenarnya seorang Rasul) maka hendaklah ia membawa kepada kita satu mukjizat sebagaimana mukjizat-mukjizat yang dibawa oleh Rasul-rasul yang telah diutus dahulu".

ayahs.arabic: مَآ ءَامَنَتْ قَبْلَهُم مِّن قَرْيَةٍ أَهْلَكْنَـٰهَآ ۖ أَفَهُمْ يُؤْمِنُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Ma amanat qablahum min qaryatin ahlaknaha afahum yuminoona

translations.en_sahih: Not a [single] city which We destroyed believed before them, so will they believe?
translations.en_yusufali: (As to those) before them, not one of the populations which We destroyed believed: will these believe?
translations.ms_basmeih: Tidak ada penduduk sesebuah negeri pun yang Kami binasakan sebelum mereka, yang telah beriman kepada mukjizat yang diberi kepadanya; maka benarkah mereka yang meminta mukjizat itu mahu beriman?

ayahs.arabic: وَمَآ أَرْسَلْنَا قَبْلَكَ إِلَّا رِجَالًا نُّوحِىٓ إِلَيْهِمْ ۖ فَسْـَٔلُوٓا۟ أَهْلَ ٱلذِّكْرِ إِن كُنتُمْ لَا تَعْلَمُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wama arsalna qablaka illa rijalan noohee ilayhim faisaloo ahla alththikri in kuntum la taAAlamoona

translations.en_sahih: And We sent not before you, [O Muhammad], except men to whom We revealed [the message], so ask the people of the message if you do not know.
translations.en_yusufali: Before thee, also, the messengers We sent were but men, to whom We granted inspiration: If ye realise this not, ask of those who possess the Message.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan Kami tidak mengutus Rasul-rasul sebelummu (wahai Muhammad) melainkan orang-orang lelaki yang Kami wahyukan kepada mereka (bukan malaikat); maka bertanyalah kamu kepada AhluzZikri" jika kamu tidak mengetahui.

ayahs.arabic: وَمَا جَعَلْنَـٰهُمْ جَسَدًا لَّا يَأْكُلُونَ ٱلطَّعَامَ وَمَا كَانُوا۟ خَـٰلِدِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wama jaAAalnahum jasadan la yakuloona alttaAAama wama kanoo khalideena

translations.en_sahih: And We did not make the prophets forms not eating food, nor were they immortal [on earth].
translations.en_yusufali: Nor did We give them bodies that ate no food, nor were they exempt from death.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan Kami tidak menjadikan Rasul-rasul itu bertubuh badan yang tidak makan minum, dan mereka pula tidak akan kekal hidup selama-lamanya (di dunia).

ayahs.arabic: ثُمَّ صَدَقْنَـٰهُمُ ٱلْوَعْدَ فَأَنجَيْنَـٰهُمْ وَمَن نَّشَآءُ وَأَهْلَكْنَا ٱلْمُسْرِفِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Thumma sadaqnahumu alwaAAda faanjaynahum waman nashao waahlakna almusrifeena

translations.en_sahih: Then We fulfilled for them the promise, and We saved them and whom We willed and destroyed the transgressors.
translations.en_yusufali: In the end We fulfilled to them Our Promise, and We saved them and those whom We pleased, but We destroyed those who transgressed beyond bounds.
translations.ms_basmeih: Kemudian Kami tepati janji Kami kepada mereka, lalu Kami selamatkan mereka dan sesiapa yang Kami kehendaki, dan (sebaliknya) Kami binasakan orang-orang yang melampaui batas.

ayahs.arabic: لَقَدْ أَنزَلْنَآ إِلَيْكُمْ كِتَـٰبًا فِيهِ ذِكْرُكُمْ ۖ أَفَلَا تَعْقِلُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Laqad anzalna ilaykum kitaban feehi thikrukum afala taAAqiloona

translations.en_sahih: We have certainly sent down to you a Book in which is your mention. Then will you not reason?
translations.en_yusufali: We have revealed for you (O men!) a book in which is a Message for you: will ye not then understand?
translations.ms_basmeih: Sesungguhnya Kami telah menurunkan kepada kamu sebuah Kitab (Al-Quran) yang mengandungi perkara yang menimbulkan sebutan baik dan kelebihan untuk kamu, maka mengapa kamu tidak memahaminya (dan bersyukur akan nikmat yang besar itu)?

ayahs.arabic: وَكَمْ قَصَمْنَا مِن قَرْيَةٍ كَانَتْ ظَالِمَةً وَأَنشَأْنَا بَعْدَهَا قَوْمًا ءَاخَرِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wakam qasamna min qaryatin kanat thalimatan waanshana baAAdaha qawman akhareena

translations.en_sahih: And how many a city which was unjust have We shattered and produced after it another people.
translations.en_yusufali: How many were the populations We utterly destroyed because of their iniquities, setting up in their places other peoples?
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan berapa banyak Kami telah pecah-belahkan dan binasakan penduduk negeri yang melakukan kezaliman, dan Kami telah menjadikan sesudah mereka, kaum yang lain sebagai gantinya.

ayahs.arabic: فَلَمَّآ أَحَسُّوا۟ بَأْسَنَآ إِذَا هُم مِّنْهَا يَرْكُضُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Falamma ahassoo basana itha hum minha yarkudoona

translations.en_sahih: And when its inhabitants perceived Our punishment, at once they fled from it.
translations.en_yusufali: Yet, when they felt Our Punishment (coming), behold, they (tried to) flee from it.
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka ketika mereka merasai (kedatangan) azab Kami, mereka dengan serta-merta lari keluar dari negeri itu.

ayahs.arabic: لَا تَرْكُضُوا۟ وَٱرْجِعُوٓا۟ إِلَىٰ مَآ أُتْرِفْتُمْ فِيهِ وَمَسَـٰكِنِكُمْ لَعَلَّكُمْ تُسْـَٔلُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: La tarkudoo wairjiAAoo ila ma otriftum feehi wamasakinikum laAAallakum tusaloona

translations.en_sahih: [Some angels said], "Do not flee but return to where you were given luxury and to your homes - perhaps you will be questioned."
translations.en_yusufali: Flee not, but return to the good things of this life which were given you, and to your homes in order that ye may be called to account.
translations.ms_basmeih: (Lalu dikatakan kepada mereka): "Janganlah kamu lari, dan sebaliknya kembalilah kepada kemewahan hidup yang telah diberikan kepada kamu, dan ke tempat-tempat tinggal kamu, supaya kamu dapat ditanya mengenai apa yang berlaku".

ayahs.arabic: قَالُوا۟ يَـٰوَيْلَنَآ إِنَّا كُنَّا ظَـٰلِمِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Qaloo ya waylana inna kunna thalimeena

translations.en_sahih: They said, "O woe to us! Indeed, we were wrongdoers."
translations.en_yusufali: They said: "Ah! woe to us! We were indeed wrong-doers!"
translations.ms_basmeih: (Akhirnya) mereka berkata: "Aduhai celakanya kami! Sesungguhnya kami adalah orang-orang yang berlaku zalim!"

ayahs.arabic: فَمَا زَالَت تِّلْكَ دَعْوَىٰهُمْ حَتَّىٰ جَعَلْنَـٰهُمْ حَصِيدًا خَـٰمِدِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Fama zalat tilka daAAwahum hatta jaAAalnahum haseedan khamideena

translations.en_sahih: And that declaration of theirs did not cease until We made them [as] a harvest [mowed down], extinguished [like a fire].
translations.en_yusufali: And that cry of theirs ceased not, till We made them as a field that is mown, as ashes silent and quenched.
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka demikianlah seterusnya jeritan dan keluhan mereka, sehingga Kami jadikan mereka hancur lebur dan sunyi-sepi.

ayahs.arabic: وَمَا خَلَقْنَا ٱلسَّمَآءَ وَٱلْأَرْضَ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا لَـٰعِبِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wama khalaqna alssamaa waalarda wama baynahuma laAAibeena

translations.en_sahih: And We did not create the heaven and earth and that between them in play.
translations.en_yusufali: Not for (idle) sport did We create the heavens and the earth and all that is between!
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan (ingatlah) tidaklah Kami menciptakan langit dan bumi serta segala yang ada di antaranya, secara main-main.

ayahs.arabic: لَوْ أَرَدْنَآ أَن نَّتَّخِذَ لَهْوًا لَّٱتَّخَذْنَـٰهُ مِن لَّدُنَّآ إِن كُنَّا فَـٰعِلِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Law aradna an nattakhitha lahwan laittakhathnahu min ladunna in kunna faAAileena

translations.en_sahih: Had We intended to take a diversion, We could have taken it from [what is] with Us - if [indeed] We were to do so.
translations.en_yusufali: If it had been Our wish to take (just) a pastime, We should surely have taken it from the things nearest to Us, if We would do (such a thing)!
translations.ms_basmeih: Sekiranya Kami hendak mengambil sesuatu untuk hiburan, tentulah Kami akan mengambilnya dari sisi Kami; Kami tidak melakukannya.

ayahs.arabic: بَلْ نَقْذِفُ بِٱلْحَقِّ عَلَى ٱلْبَـٰطِلِ فَيَدْمَغُهُۥ فَإِذَا هُوَ زَاهِقٌ ۚ وَلَكُمُ ٱلْوَيْلُ مِمَّا تَصِفُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Bal naqthifu bialhaqqi AAala albatili fayadmaghuhu faitha huwa zahiqun walakumu alwaylu mimma tasifoona

translations.en_sahih: Rather, We dash the truth upon falsehood, and it destroys it, and thereupon it departs. And for you is destruction from that which you describe.
translations.en_yusufali: Nay, We hurl the Truth against falsehood, and it knocks out its brain, and behold, falsehood doth perish! Ah! woe be to you for the (false) things ye ascribe (to Us).
translations.ms_basmeih: Bahkan Kami sentiasa mengarahkan yang benar menentang yang salah, lalu ia menghancurkannya, maka dengan serta-merta hilang lenyaplah dia. Dan (tetaplah) kecelakaan akan menimpa kamu disebabkan apa yang kamu sifatkan (terhadap Kami).

ayahs.arabic: وَلَهُۥ مَن فِى ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۚ وَمَنْ عِندَهُۥ لَا يَسْتَكْبِرُونَ عَنْ عِبَادَتِهِۦ وَلَا يَسْتَحْسِرُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Walahu man fee alssamawati waalardi waman AAindahu la yastakbiroona AAan AAibadatihi wala yastahsiroona

translations.en_sahih: To Him belongs whoever is in the heavens and the earth. And those near Him are not prevented by arrogance from His worship, nor do they tire.
translations.en_yusufali: To Him belong all (creatures) in the heavens and on earth: Even those who are in His (very) Presence are not too proud to serve Him, nor are they (ever) weary (of His service):
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan (ingatlah) segala yang ada di langit dan di bumi adalah milik kepunyaan Allah jua; dan malaikat-malaikat yang ada di sisiNya tidak membesarkan diri dan tidak enggan daripada beribadat kepadaNya, dan tidak pula mereka merasa penat dan letih.

ayahs.arabic: يُسَبِّحُونَ ٱلَّيْلَ وَٱلنَّهَارَ لَا يَفْتُرُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Yusabbihoona allayla waalnnahara la yafturoona

translations.en_sahih: They exalt [Him] night and day [and] do not slacken.
translations.en_yusufali: They celebrate His praises night and day, nor do they ever flag or intermit.
translations.ms_basmeih: Mereka beribadat malam dan siang, dengan tidak berhenti-henti.

ayahs.arabic: أَمِ ٱتَّخَذُوٓا۟ ءَالِهَةً مِّنَ ٱلْأَرْضِ هُمْ يُنشِرُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Ami ittakhathoo alihatan mina alardi hum yunshiroona

translations.en_sahih: Or have men taken for themselves gods from the earth who resurrect [the dead]?
translations.en_yusufali: Or have they taken (for worship) gods from the earth who can raise (the dead)?
translations.ms_basmeih: Adakah benda-benda dari bumi yang mereka jadikan tuhan-tuhan itu, dapat menghidupkan semula sesuatu yang mati?

ayahs.arabic: لَوْ كَانَ فِيهِمَآ ءَالِهَةٌ إِلَّا ٱللَّهُ لَفَسَدَتَا ۚ فَسُبْحَـٰنَ ٱللَّهِ رَبِّ ٱلْعَرْشِ عَمَّا يَصِفُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Law kana feehima alihatun illa Allahu lafasadata fasubhana Allahi rabbi alAAarshi AAamma yasifoona

translations.en_sahih: Had there been within the heavens and earth gods besides Allah, they both would have been ruined. So exalted is Allah, Lord of the Throne, above what they describe.
translations.en_yusufali: If there were, in the heavens and the earth, other gods besides Allah, there would have been confusion in both! but glory to Allah, the Lord of the Throne: (High is He) above what they attribute to Him!
translations.ms_basmeih: Kalau ada di langit dan di bumi tuhan-tuhan yang lain dari Allah, nescaya rosaklah pentadbiran kedua-duanya. Maka (bertauhidlah kamu kepada Allah dengan menegaskan): Maha Suci Allah, Tuhan yang mempunyai Arasy, dari apa yang mereka sifatkan.

ayahs.arabic: لَا يُسْـَٔلُ عَمَّا يَفْعَلُ وَهُمْ يُسْـَٔلُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: La yusalu AAamma yafAAalu wahum yusaloona

translations.en_sahih: He is not questioned about what He does, but they will be questioned.
translations.en_yusufali: He cannot be questioned for His acts, but they will be questioned (for theirs).
translations.ms_basmeih: Ia tidak boleh ditanya tentang apa yang Ia lakukan, sedang merekalah yang akan ditanya kelak.

ayahs.arabic: أَمِ ٱتَّخَذُوا۟ مِن دُونِهِۦٓ ءَالِهَةً ۖ قُلْ هَاتُوا۟ بُرْهَـٰنَكُمْ ۖ هَـٰذَا ذِكْرُ مَن مَّعِىَ وَذِكْرُ مَن قَبْلِى ۗ بَلْ أَكْثَرُهُمْ لَا يَعْلَمُونَ ٱلْحَقَّ ۖ فَهُم مُّعْرِضُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Ami ittakhathoo min doonihi alihatan qul hatoo burhanakum hatha thikru man maAAiya wathikru man qablee bal aktharuhum la yaAAlamoona alhaqqa fahum muAAridoona

translations.en_sahih: Or have they taken gods besides Him? Say, [O Muhammad], "Produce your proof. This [Qur'an] is the message for those with me and the message of those before me." But most of them do not know the truth, so they are turning away.
translations.en_yusufali: Or have they taken for worship (other) gods besides him? Say, "Bring your convincing proof: this is the Message of those with me and the Message of those before me." But most of them know not the Truth, and so turn away.
translations.ms_basmeih: Patutkah mereka menyembah tuhan-tuhan yang lain dari Allah? Katakanlah (wahai Muhammad): "Bawalah keterangan dan bukti kamu; kandungan Al-Quran ini menjadi peringatan dan bukti tauhid umatku, juga peringatan dan bukti tauhid umat-umat yang dahulu daripadaku". (Kaum musyrik tidak mempunyai sebarang keterangan) bahkan kebanyakan mereka tidak mengetahui mana yang benar dan mana yang salah, dengan sebab itulah maka mereka berpaling ingkar.

ayahs.arabic: وَمَآ أَرْسَلْنَا مِن قَبْلِكَ مِن رَّسُولٍ إِلَّا نُوحِىٓ إِلَيْهِ أَنَّهُۥ لَآ إِلَـٰهَ إِلَّآ أَنَا۠ فَٱعْبُدُونِ
ayahs.transliteration: Wama arsalna min qablika min rasoolin illa noohee ilayhi annahu la ilaha illa ana faoAAbudooni

translations.en_sahih: And We sent not before you any messenger except that We revealed to him that, "There is no deity except Me, so worship Me."
translations.en_yusufali: Not a messenger did We send before thee without this inspiration sent by Us to him: that there is no god but I; therefore worship and serve Me.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan Kami tidak mengutus sebelummu (wahai Muhammad) seseorang Rasul pun melainkan Kami wahyukan kepadanya: "Bahawa sesungguhnya tiada Tuhan (yang berhak disembah) melainkan Aku; oleh itu, beribadatlah kamu kepadaKu".

ayahs.arabic: وَقَالُوا۟ ٱتَّخَذَ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنُ وَلَدًا ۗ سُبْحَـٰنَهُۥ ۚ بَلْ عِبَادٌ مُّكْرَمُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Waqaloo ittakhatha alrrahmanu waladan subhanahu bal AAibadun mukramoona

translations.en_sahih: And they say, "The Most Merciful has taken a son." Exalted is He! Rather, they are [but] honored servants.
translations.en_yusufali: And they say: "(Allah) Most Gracious has begotten offspring." Glory to Him! they are (but) servants raised to honour.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan mereka (yang musyrik) berkata: "(Allah) Ar-Rahman mempunyai anak". Maha Sucilah Ia. Bahkan (mereka yang dikatakan menjadi anak Allah itu) ialah hamba-hambaNya yang dimuliakan.

ayahs.arabic: لَا يَسْبِقُونَهُۥ بِٱلْقَوْلِ وَهُم بِأَمْرِهِۦ يَعْمَلُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: La yasbiqoonahu bialqawli wahum biamrihi yaAAmaloona

translations.en_sahih: They cannot precede Him in word, and they act by His command.
translations.en_yusufali: They speak not before He speaks, and they act (in all things) by His Command.
translations.ms_basmeih: Mereka tidak mendahuluiNya dengan perkataan dan mereka pula mengerjakan apa yang diperintahkanNya.

ayahs.arabic: يَعْلَمُ مَا بَيْنَ أَيْدِيهِمْ وَمَا خَلْفَهُمْ وَلَا يَشْفَعُونَ إِلَّا لِمَنِ ٱرْتَضَىٰ وَهُم مِّنْ خَشْيَتِهِۦ مُشْفِقُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: YaAAlamu ma bayna aydeehim wama khalfahum wala yashfaAAoona illa limani irtada wahum min khashyatihi mushfiqoona

translations.en_sahih: He knows what is [presently] before them and what will be after them, and they cannot intercede except on behalf of one whom He approves. And they, from fear of Him, are apprehensive.
translations.en_yusufali: He knows what is before them, and what is behind them, and they offer no intercession except for those who are acceptable, and they stand in awe and reverence of His (Glory).
translations.ms_basmeih: Allah mengetahui apa yang di hadapan mereka (yang telah mereka lakukan), dan apa yang di belakang mereka (yang akan mereka lakukan); dan mereka tidak memohon syafaat melainkan bagi sesiapa yang diredhai Allah; dan mereka pula sentiasa cemas takut daripada ditimpa azabNya.

ayahs.arabic: ۞ وَمَن يَقُلْ مِنْهُمْ إِنِّىٓ إِلَـٰهٌ مِّن دُونِهِۦ فَذَٰلِكَ نَجْزِيهِ جَهَنَّمَ ۚ كَذَٰلِكَ نَجْزِى ٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Waman yaqul minhum innee ilahun min doonihi fathalika najzeehi jahannama kathalika najzee alththalimeena

translations.en_sahih: And whoever of them should say, "Indeed, I am a god besides Him"- that one We would recompense with Hell. Thus do We recompense the wrongdoers.
translations.en_yusufali: If any of them should say, "I am a god besides Him", such a one We should reward with Hell: thus do We reward those who do wrong.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan (jika ada) sesiapa di antara mereka berkata: "Sesungguhnya aku ialah tuhan selain dari Allah", maka yang berkata sedemikian itu, Kami akan membalasnya dengan (azab) neraka jahannam; demikianlah Kami membalas golongan yang zalim.

ayahs.arabic: أَوَلَمْ يَرَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوٓا۟ أَنَّ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ كَانَتَا رَتْقًا فَفَتَقْنَـٰهُمَا ۖ وَجَعَلْنَا مِنَ ٱلْمَآءِ كُلَّ شَىْءٍ حَىٍّ ۖ أَفَلَا يُؤْمِنُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Awalam yara allatheena kafaroo anna alssamawati waalarda kanata ratqan fafataqnahuma wajaAAalna mina almai kulla shayin hayyin afala yuminoona

translations.en_sahih: Have those who disbelieved not considered that the heavens and the earth were a joined entity, and We separated them and made from water every living thing? Then will they not believe?
translations.en_yusufali: Do not the Unbelievers see that the heavens and the earth were joined together (as one unit of creation), before we clove them asunder? We made from water every living thing. Will they not then believe?
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan tidakkah orang-orang kafir itu memikirkan dan mempercayai bahawa sesungguhnya langit dan bumi itu pada asal mulanya bercantum (sebagai benda yang satu), lalu Kami pisahkan antara keduanya? Dan Kami jadikan dari air, tiap-tiap benda yang hidup? Maka mengapa mereka tidak mahu beriman?

ayahs.arabic: وَجَعَلْنَا فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ رَوَٰسِىَ أَن تَمِيدَ بِهِمْ وَجَعَلْنَا فِيهَا فِجَاجًا سُبُلًا لَّعَلَّهُمْ يَهْتَدُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: WajaAAalna fee alardi rawasiya an tameeda bihim wajaAAalna feeha fijajan subulan laAAallahum yahtadoona

translations.en_sahih: And We placed within the earth firmly set mountains, lest it should shift with them, and We made therein [mountain] passes [as] roads that they might be guided.
translations.en_yusufali: And We have set on the earth mountains standing firm, lest it should shake with them, and We have made therein broad highways (between mountains) for them to pass through: that they may receive Guidance.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan Kami telah menjadikan di bumi gunung-ganang yang menetapnya, supaya bumi itu tidak menggegar mereka; dan Kami jadikan padanya celah-celah sebagai jalan-jalan lalu-lalang, supaya mereka dapat sampai kepada mencapai keperluan rohani dan jasmani.

ayahs.arabic: وَجَعَلْنَا ٱلسَّمَآءَ سَقْفًا مَّحْفُوظًا ۖ وَهُمْ عَنْ ءَايَـٰتِهَا مُعْرِضُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: WajaAAalna alssamaa saqfan mahfoothan wahum AAan ayatiha muAAridoona

translations.en_sahih: And We made the sky a protected ceiling, but they, from its signs, are turning away.
translations.en_yusufali: And We have made the heavens as a canopy well guarded: yet do they turn away from the Signs which these things (point to)!
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan Kami telah menjadikan langit sebagai bumbung yang terpelihara dan terkawal, sedang mereka (yang kafir itu) berpaling tidak memerhatikan tanda-tanda (kekuasaan Kami) yang ada padanya.

ayahs.arabic: وَهُوَ ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَ ٱلَّيْلَ وَٱلنَّهَارَ وَٱلشَّمْسَ وَٱلْقَمَرَ ۖ كُلٌّ فِى فَلَكٍ يَسْبَحُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wahuwa allathee khalaqa allayla waalnnahara waalshshamsa waalqamara kullun fee falakin yasbahoona

translations.en_sahih: And it is He who created the night and the day and the sun and the moon; all [heavenly bodies] in an orbit are swimming.
translations.en_yusufali: It is He Who created the Night and the Day, and the sun and the moon: all (the celestial bodies) swim along, each in its rounded course.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan Dia lah (Tuhan) yang telah menjadikan malam dan siang, serta matahari dan bulan; tiap-tiap satunya beredar terapung-apung di tempat edaran masing-masing (di angkasa lepas).

ayahs.arabic: وَمَا جَعَلْنَا لِبَشَرٍ مِّن قَبْلِكَ ٱلْخُلْدَ ۖ أَفَإِي۟ن مِّتَّ فَهُمُ ٱلْخَـٰلِدُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wama jaAAalna libasharin min qablika alkhulda afain mitta fahumu alkhalidoona

translations.en_sahih: And We did not grant to any man before you eternity [on earth]; so if you die - would they be eternal?
translations.en_yusufali: We granted not to any man before thee permanent life (here): if then thou shouldst die, would they live permanently?
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan Kami tidak menjadikan seseorang manusia sebelummu dapat hidup kekal (di dunia ini). Maka kalau engkau meninggal dunia (wahai Muhammad), adakah mereka akan hidup selama-lamanya?

ayahs.arabic: كُلُّ نَفْسٍ ذَآئِقَةُ ٱلْمَوْتِ ۗ وَنَبْلُوكُم بِٱلشَّرِّ وَٱلْخَيْرِ فِتْنَةً ۖ وَإِلَيْنَا تُرْجَعُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Kullu nafsin thaiqatu almawti wanablookum bialshsharri waalkhayri fitnatan wailayna turjaAAoona

translations.en_sahih: Every soul will taste death. And We test you with evil and with good as trial; and to Us you will be returned.
translations.en_yusufali: Every soul shall have a taste of death: and We test you by evil and by good by way of trial. to Us must ye return.
translations.ms_basmeih: Tiap-tiap diri akan merasai mati, dan Kami menguji kamu dengan kesusahan dan kesenangan sebagai cubaan; dan kepada Kamilah kamu semua akan dikembalikan.

ayahs.arabic: وَإِذَا رَءَاكَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوٓا۟ إِن يَتَّخِذُونَكَ إِلَّا هُزُوًا أَهَـٰذَا ٱلَّذِى يَذْكُرُ ءَالِهَتَكُمْ وَهُم بِذِكْرِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ هُمْ كَـٰفِرُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Waitha raaka allatheena kafaroo in yattakhithoonaka illa huzuwan ahatha allathee yathkuru alihatakum wahum bithikri alrrahmani hum kafiroona

translations.en_sahih: And when those who disbelieve see you, [O Muhammad], they take you not except in ridicule, [saying], "Is this the one who insults your gods?" And they are, at the mention of the Most Merciful, disbelievers.
translations.en_yusufali: When the Unbelievers see thee, they treat thee not except with ridicule. "Is this," (they say), "the one who talks of your gods?" and they blaspheme at the mention of (Allah) Most Gracious!
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan apabila orang-orang kafir itu melihatmu, mereka hanyalah menjadikan perkara yang engkau sampaikan itu sebagai ejek-ejekan sahaja, sambil berkata sesama sendiri: "Inikah dia orangnya yang mencaci tuhan-tuhan kamu?" (Mereka berkata demikian) sedang mereka sendiri kufur ingkar kepada Al-Quran yang mengandungi peringatan Allah yang melimpah-limpah rahmatNya.

ayahs.arabic: خُلِقَ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ مِنْ عَجَلٍ ۚ سَأُو۟رِيكُمْ ءَايَـٰتِى فَلَا تَسْتَعْجِلُونِ
ayahs.transliteration: Khuliqa alinsanu min AAajalin saoreekum ayatee fala tastaAAjiloona

translations.en_sahih: Man was created of haste. I will show you My signs, so do not impatiently urge Me.
translations.en_yusufali: Man is a creature of haste: soon (enough) will I show you My Signs; then ye will not ask Me to hasten them!
translations.ms_basmeih: Jenis manusia dijadikan bertabiat terburu-buru dalam segala halya; Aku (Allah) akan perlihatkan kepada kamu tanda-tanda kekuasaanKu; maka janganlah kamu meminta disegerakan (kedatangannya).

ayahs.arabic: وَيَقُولُونَ مَتَىٰ هَـٰذَا ٱلْوَعْدُ إِن كُنتُمْ صَـٰدِقِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wayaqooloona mata hatha alwaAAdu in kuntum sadiqeena

translations.en_sahih: And they say, "When is this promise, if you should be truthful?"
translations.en_yusufali: They say: "When will this promise come to pass, if ye are telling the truth?"
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan (kerana tabiat terburu-burunya) mereka berkata: "Bilakah berlakunya janji azab itu, jika betul kamu orang-orang yang berkata benar?".

ayahs.arabic: لَوْ يَعْلَمُ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ حِينَ لَا يَكُفُّونَ عَن وُجُوهِهِمُ ٱلنَّارَ وَلَا عَن ظُهُورِهِمْ وَلَا هُمْ يُنصَرُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Law yaAAlamu allatheena kafaroo heena la yakuffoona AAan wujoohihimu alnnara wala AAan thuhoorihim wala hum yunsaroona

translations.en_sahih: If those who disbelieved but knew the time when they will not avert the Fire from their faces or from their backs and they will not be aided...
translations.en_yusufali: If only the Unbelievers knew (the time) when they will not be able to ward off the fire from their faces, nor yet from their backs, and (when) no help can reach them!
translations.ms_basmeih: Kalaulah orang-orang kafir itu mengetahui apa yang akan menimpa mereka ketika mereka tidak dapat menahan atau mengelakkan api neraka dari muka dan belakang mereka, dan mereka pula tidak diberi pertolongan, (tentulah mereka segera beriman, dan tidak berkata demikian).

ayahs.arabic: بَلْ تَأْتِيهِم بَغْتَةً فَتَبْهَتُهُمْ فَلَا يَسْتَطِيعُونَ رَدَّهَا وَلَا هُمْ يُنظَرُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Bal tateehim baghtatan fatabhatuhum fala yastateeAAoona raddaha wala hum yuntharoona

translations.en_sahih: Rather, it will come to them unexpectedly and bewilder them, and they will not be able to repel it, nor will they be reprieved.
translations.en_yusufali: Nay, it may come to them all of a sudden and confound them: no power will they have then to avert it, nor will they (then) get respite.
translations.ms_basmeih: (Mereka tidak diberitahu akan masa itu) bahkan (yang dijanjikan) itu akan datang kepada mereka secara mengejut, serta terus membingungkan mereka; maka mereka tidak akan terdaya menolaknya, dan tidak akan diberi tempoh bertaubat.

ayahs.arabic: وَلَقَدِ ٱسْتُهْزِئَ بِرُسُلٍ مِّن قَبْلِكَ فَحَاقَ بِٱلَّذِينَ سَخِرُوا۟ مِنْهُم مَّا كَانُوا۟ بِهِۦ يَسْتَهْزِءُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Walaqadi istuhzia birusulin min qablika fahaqa biallatheena sakhiroo minhum ma kanoo bihi yastahzioona

translations.en_sahih: And already were messengers ridiculed before you, but those who mocked them were enveloped by what they used to ridicule.
translations.en_yusufali: Mocked were (many) messenger before thee; But their scoffers were hemmed in by the thing that they mocked.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan demi sesungguhnya, telah diperolok-olokkan beberapa Rasul sebelummu, lalu orang-orang yang mengejek-ejek di antara mereka, ditimpakan balasan azab bagi apa yang mereka telah perolok-olokkan itu.

ayahs.arabic: قُلْ مَن يَكْلَؤُكُم بِٱلَّيْلِ وَٱلنَّهَارِ مِنَ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ۗ بَلْ هُمْ عَن ذِكْرِ رَبِّهِم مُّعْرِضُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Qul man yaklaokum biallayli waalnnahari mina alrrahmani bal hum AAan thikri rabbihim muAAridoona

translations.en_sahih: Say, "Who can protect you at night or by day from the Most Merciful?" But they are, from the remembrance of their Lord, turning away.
translations.en_yusufali: Say: "Who can keep you safe by night and by day from (the Wrath of) (Allah) Most Gracious?" Yet they turn away from the mention of their Lord.
translations.ms_basmeih: Katakanlah (wahai Muhammad): "Siapakah yang dapat menjaga keselamatan kamu pada malam dan siang daripada azab Tuhan yang bersifat Maha Pemurah?" (Mereka tidak memikirkan yang demikian) bahkan mereka tetap berpaling ingkar dari pengajaran Tuhan mereka.

ayahs.arabic: أَمْ لَهُمْ ءَالِهَةٌ تَمْنَعُهُم مِّن دُونِنَا ۚ لَا يَسْتَطِيعُونَ نَصْرَ أَنفُسِهِمْ وَلَا هُم مِّنَّا يُصْحَبُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Am lahum alihatun tamnaAAuhum min doonina la yastateeAAoona nasra anfusihim wala hum minna yushaboona

translations.en_sahih: Or do they have gods to defend them other than Us? They are unable [even] to help themselves, nor can they be protected from Us.
translations.en_yusufali: Or have they gods that can guard them from Us? They have no power to aid themselves, nor can they be defended from Us.
translations.ms_basmeih: Tidak ada bagi mereka tuhan-tuhan yang dapat melindungi mereka dari azab Kami. Mereka yang dipertuhankan itu tidak dapat menolong dirinya sendiri, dan tidak pula mereka dibantu dengan pertolongan dari pihak Kami.

ayahs.arabic: بَلْ مَتَّعْنَا هَـٰٓؤُلَآءِ وَءَابَآءَهُمْ حَتَّىٰ طَالَ عَلَيْهِمُ ٱلْعُمُرُ ۗ أَفَلَا يَرَوْنَ أَنَّا نَأْتِى ٱلْأَرْضَ نَنقُصُهَا مِنْ أَطْرَافِهَآ ۚ أَفَهُمُ ٱلْغَـٰلِبُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Bal mattaAAna haolai waabaahum hatta tala AAalayhimu alAAumuru afala yarawna anna natee alarda nanqusuha min atrafiha afahumu alghaliboona

translations.en_sahih: But, [on the contrary], We have provided good things for these [disbelievers] and their fathers until life was prolonged for them. Then do they not see that We set upon the land, reducing it from its borders? So it is they who will overcome?
translations.en_yusufali: Nay, We gave the good things of this life to these men and their fathers until the period grew long for them; See they not that We gradually reduce the land (in their control) from its outlying borders? Is it then they who will win?
translations.ms_basmeih: (Bukan benda-benda yang dipertuhankan itu yang memberi kesenangan kepada mereka) bahkan Kami biarkan mereka dan datuk-nenek mereka menikmati (kesenangan hidup) hingga berlanjutanlah umur mereka (dalam keadaan yang menyebabkan berlaku perkara yang tidak diingini mereka). Maka tidakkah mereka melihat bahawa kami datangi daerah bumi yang mereka kuasai dengan menguranginya sedikit demi sedikit dari sempadan-sempadannya? Jika demikian halnya, maka adakah mereka yang akan menang?

ayahs.arabic: قُلْ إِنَّمَآ أُنذِرُكُم بِٱلْوَحْىِ ۚ وَلَا يَسْمَعُ ٱلصُّمُّ ٱلدُّعَآءَ إِذَا مَا يُنذَرُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Qul innama onthirukum bialwahyi wala yasmaAAu alssummu aldduAAaa itha ma yuntharoona

translations.en_sahih: Say, "I only warn you by revelation." But the deaf do not hear the call when they are warned.
translations.en_yusufali: Say, "I do but warn you according to revelation": But the deaf will not hear the call, (even) when they are warned!
translations.ms_basmeih: Katakanlah (wahai Muhammad): "Sesungguhnya aku hanyalah memberi amaran kepada kamu dengan wahyu (Al-Quran yang diturunkan Allah kepadaku); dan sudah tentu orang-orang yang pekak tidak dapat mendengar seruan apabila mereka diberi amaran, (maka janganlah kamu menjadi pekak kerana azab Tuhan amatlah berat).

ayahs.arabic: وَلَئِن مَّسَّتْهُمْ نَفْحَةٌ مِّنْ عَذَابِ رَبِّكَ لَيَقُولُنَّ يَـٰوَيْلَنَآ إِنَّا كُنَّا ظَـٰلِمِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Walain massathum nafhatun min AAathabi rabbika layaqoolunna ya waylana inna kunna thalimeena

translations.en_sahih: And if [as much as] a whiff of the punishment of your Lord should touch them, they would surely say, "O woe to us! Indeed, we have been wrongdoers."
translations.en_yusufali: If but a breath of the Wrath of thy Lord do touch them, they will then say, "Woe to us! we did wrong indeed!"
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan demi sesungguhnya, jika mereka disentuh oleh sedikit sahaja dari azab Tuhanmu, sudah tentu mereka akan berkata: "Aduhai celakanya kami! Sebenarnya kami adalah orang-orang yang zalim (terhadap diri sendiri)!"

ayahs.arabic: وَنَضَعُ ٱلْمَوَٰزِينَ ٱلْقِسْطَ لِيَوْمِ ٱلْقِيَـٰمَةِ فَلَا تُظْلَمُ نَفْسٌ شَيْـًٔا ۖ وَإِن كَانَ مِثْقَالَ حَبَّةٍ مِّنْ خَرْدَلٍ أَتَيْنَا بِهَا ۗ وَكَفَىٰ بِنَا حَـٰسِبِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: WanadaAAu almawazeena alqista liyawmi alqiyamati fala tuthlamu nafsun shayan wain kana mithqala habbatin min khardalin atayna biha wakafa bina hasibeena

translations.en_sahih: And We place the scales of justice for the Day of Resurrection, so no soul will be treated unjustly at all. And if there is [even] the weight of a mustard seed, We will bring it forth. And sufficient are We as accountant.
translations.en_yusufali: We shall set up scales of justice for the Day of Judgment, so that not a soul will be dealt with unjustly in the least, and if there be (no more than) the weight of a mustard seed, We will bring it (to account): and enough are We to take account.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan (ingatlah) Kami akan mengadakan neraca timbangan yang adil untuk (menimbang amal makhluk-makhluk pada) hari kiamat; maka tidak ada diri sesiapa akan teraniaya sedikitpun; dan jika (amalnya) itu seberat biji sawi (sekalipun), nescaya Kami akan mendatangkannya (untuk ditimbang dan dihitung); dan cukuplah Kami sebagai Penghitung.

ayahs.arabic: وَلَقَدْ ءَاتَيْنَا مُوسَىٰ وَهَـٰرُونَ ٱلْفُرْقَانَ وَضِيَآءً وَذِكْرًا لِّلْمُتَّقِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Walaqad atayna moosa waharoona alfurqana wadiyaan wathikran lilmuttaqeena

translations.en_sahih: And We had already given Moses and Aaron the criterion and a light and a reminder for the righteous
translations.en_yusufali: In the past We granted to Moses and Aaron the criterion (for judgment), and a Light and a Message for those who would do right,-
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan demi sesungguhnya, Kami telah memberi kepada Nabi Musa dan Nabi Harun Kitab (Taurat) yang membezakan antara yang benar dengan yang salah, dan yang menjadi cahaya yang menerangi, serta yang mengandungi pengajaran, bagi orang-orang yang mahu bertaqwa.

ayahs.arabic: ٱلَّذِينَ يَخْشَوْنَ رَبَّهُم بِٱلْغَيْبِ وَهُم مِّنَ ٱلسَّاعَةِ مُشْفِقُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Allatheena yakhshawna rabbahum bialghaybi wahum mina alssaAAati mushfiqoona

translations.en_sahih: Who fear their Lord unseen, while they are of the Hour apprehensive.
translations.en_yusufali: Those who fear their Lord in their most secret thoughts, and who hold the Hour (of Judgment) in awe.
translations.ms_basmeih: Iaitu mereka yang takut (melanggar hukum-hukum) Tuhannya semasa mereka tidak dilihat orang, dan mereka pula gerun cemas akan (peristiwa-peristiwa yang mengerikan pada) hari kiamat.

ayahs.arabic: وَهَـٰذَا ذِكْرٌ مُّبَارَكٌ أَنزَلْنَـٰهُ ۚ أَفَأَنتُمْ لَهُۥ مُنكِرُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wahatha thikrun mubarakun anzalnahu afaantum lahu munkiroona

translations.en_sahih: And this [Qur'an] is a blessed message which We have sent down. Then are you with it unacquainted?
translations.en_yusufali: And this is a blessed Message which We have sent down: will ye then reject it?
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan Al-Quran ini juga pengajaran yang berkat, yang Kami turunkan (kepada Nabi Muhammad); dengan keadaan yang demikian maka patutkah kamu mengingkarinya?

ayahs.arabic: ۞ وَلَقَدْ ءَاتَيْنَآ إِبْرَٰهِيمَ رُشْدَهُۥ مِن قَبْلُ وَكُنَّا بِهِۦ عَـٰلِمِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Walaqad atayna ibraheema rushdahu min qablu wakunna bihi AAalimeena

translations.en_sahih: And We had certainly given Abraham his sound judgement before, and We were of him well-Knowing
translations.en_yusufali: We bestowed aforetime on Abraham his rectitude of conduct, and well were We acquainted with him.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan demi sesungguhnya, Kami telah memberi kepada Nabi Ibrahim sebelum itu jalan yang benar dalam bertauhid, dan Kami adalah mengetahui akan halnya.

ayahs.arabic: إِذْ قَالَ لِأَبِيهِ وَقَوْمِهِۦ مَا هَـٰذِهِ ٱلتَّمَاثِيلُ ٱلَّتِىٓ أَنتُمْ لَهَا عَـٰكِفُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Ith qala liabeehi waqawmihi ma hathihi alttamatheelu allatee antum laha AAakifoona

translations.en_sahih: When he said to his father and his people, "What are these statues to which you are devoted?"
translations.en_yusufali: Behold! he said to his father and his people, "What are these images, to which ye are (so assiduously) devoted?"
translations.ms_basmeih: Ketika ia berkata kepada bapanya dan kaumnya: "Apakah hakikatnya patung-patung ini yang kamu bersungguh-sungguh memujanya?"

ayahs.arabic: قَالُوا۟ وَجَدْنَآ ءَابَآءَنَا لَهَا عَـٰبِدِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Qaloo wajadna abaana laha AAabideena

translations.en_sahih: They said, "We found our fathers worshippers of them."
translations.en_yusufali: They said, "We found our fathers worshipping them."
translations.ms_basmeih: Mereka menjawab: "Kami dapati datuk nenek kami selalu menyembahnya".

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ لَقَدْ كُنتُمْ أَنتُمْ وَءَابَآؤُكُمْ فِى ضَلَـٰلٍ مُّبِينٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Qala laqad kuntum antum waabaokum fee dalalin mubeenin

translations.en_sahih: He said, "You were certainly, you and your fathers, in manifest error."
translations.en_yusufali: He said, "Indeed ye have been in manifest error - ye and your fathers."
translations.ms_basmeih: Ia berkata: "Sesungguhnya kamu dan datuk-nenek kamu adalah dalam kesesatan yang nyata".

ayahs.arabic: قَالُوٓا۟ أَجِئْتَنَا بِٱلْحَقِّ أَمْ أَنتَ مِنَ ٱللَّـٰعِبِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Qaloo ajitana bialhaqqi am anta mina allaAAibeena

translations.en_sahih: They said, "Have you come to us with truth, or are you of those who jest?"
translations.en_yusufali: They said, "Have you brought us the Truth, or are you one of those who jest?"
translations.ms_basmeih: Mereka bertanya: "Adakah engkau membawa kepada kami sesuatu yang benar (sebagai seorang Rasul), atau engkau dari orang-orang yang bermain-main sahaja?"

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ بَل رَّبُّكُمْ رَبُّ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ٱلَّذِى فَطَرَهُنَّ وَأَنَا۠ عَلَىٰ ذَٰلِكُم مِّنَ ٱلشَّـٰهِدِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Qala bal rabbukum rabbu alssamawati waalardi allathee fatarahunna waana AAala thalikum mina alshshahideena

translations.en_sahih: He said, "[No], rather, your Lord is the Lord of the heavens and the earth who created them, and I, to that, am of those who testify.
translations.en_yusufali: He said, "Nay, your Lord is the Lord of the heavens and the earth, He Who created them (from nothing): and I am a witness to this (Truth).
translations.ms_basmeih: Ia menjawab: "(Bukan bermain-main) bahkan (untuk menegaskan bahawa) Tuhan kamu ialah Tuhan yang mentadbirkan langit dan bumi, Dia lah yang menciptanya; dan aku adalah dari orang-orang yang boleh memberi keterangan mengesahkan yang demikian itu.

ayahs.arabic: وَتَٱللَّهِ لَأَكِيدَنَّ أَصْنَـٰمَكُم بَعْدَ أَن تُوَلُّوا۟ مُدْبِرِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: WataAllahi laakeedanna asnamakum baAAda an tuwalloo mudbireena

translations.en_sahih: And [I swear] by Allah, I will surely plan against your idols after you have turned and gone away."
translations.en_yusufali: "And by Allah, I have a plan for your idols - after ye go away and turn your backs"..
translations.ms_basmeih: "Dan demi Allah, aku akan jalankan rancangan terhadap berhala-berhala kamu, sesudah kamu pergi meninggalkan (rumah berhala ini)".

ayahs.arabic: فَجَعَلَهُمْ جُذَٰذًا إِلَّا كَبِيرًا لَّهُمْ لَعَلَّهُمْ إِلَيْهِ يَرْجِعُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: FajaAAalahum juthathan illa kabeeran lahum laAAallahum ilayhi yarjiAAoona

translations.en_sahih: So he made them into fragments, except a large one among them, that they might return to it [and question].
translations.en_yusufali: So he broke them to pieces, (all) but the biggest of them, that they might turn (and address themselves) to it.
translations.ms_basmeih: Lalu ia memecahkan semuanya berketul-ketul, kecuali sebuah berhala mereka yang besar (dibiarkannya), supaya mereka kembali kepadanya.

ayahs.arabic: قَالُوا۟ مَن فَعَلَ هَـٰذَا بِـَٔالِهَتِنَآ إِنَّهُۥ لَمِنَ ٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Qaloo man faAAala hatha bialihatina innahu lamina alththalimeena

translations.en_sahih: They said, "Who has done this to our gods? Indeed, he is of the wrongdoers."
translations.en_yusufali: They said, "Who has done this to our gods? He must indeed be some man of impiety!"
translations.ms_basmeih: (Setelah melihat kejadian itu) mereka bertanya: "Siapakah yang melakukan perbuatan yang demikian terhadap tuhan-tuhan kami? Sesungguhnya adalah ia dari orang-orang yang zalim".

ayahs.arabic: قَالُوا۟ سَمِعْنَا فَتًى يَذْكُرُهُمْ يُقَالُ لَهُۥٓ إِبْرَٰهِيمُ
ayahs.transliteration: Qaloo samiAAna fatan yathkuruhum yuqalu lahu ibraheemu

translations.en_sahih: They said, "We heard a young man mention them who is called Abraham."
translations.en_yusufali: They said, "We heard a youth talk of them: He is called Abraham."
translations.ms_basmeih: (Setengah dari) mereka berkata: "Kami ada mendengar seorang anak muda bernama Ibrahim, mencacinya".

ayahs.arabic: قَالُوا۟ فَأْتُوا۟ بِهِۦ عَلَىٰٓ أَعْيُنِ ٱلنَّاسِ لَعَلَّهُمْ يَشْهَدُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Qaloo fatoo bihi AAala aAAyuni alnnasi laAAallahum yashhadoona

translations.en_sahih: They said, "Then bring him before the eyes of the people that they may testify."
translations.en_yusufali: They said, "Then bring him before the eyes of the people, that they may bear witness."
translations.ms_basmeih: (Ketua-ketua) mereka berkata: "Jika demikian, bawalah dia di hadapan orang ramai supaya mereka menyaksikan (tindakan mengenainya).

ayahs.arabic: قَالُوٓا۟ ءَأَنتَ فَعَلْتَ هَـٰذَا بِـَٔالِهَتِنَا يَـٰٓإِبْرَٰهِيمُ
ayahs.transliteration: Qaloo aanta faAAalta hatha bialihatina ya ibraheemu

translations.en_sahih: They said, "Have you done this to our gods, O Abraham?"
translations.en_yusufali: They said, "Art thou the one that did this with our gods, O Abraham?"
translations.ms_basmeih: (Setelah ia dibawa ke situ) mereka bertanya: "Engkaukah yang melakukan demikian kepada tuhan-tuhan kami, hai Ibrahim?"

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ بَلْ فَعَلَهُۥ كَبِيرُهُمْ هَـٰذَا فَسْـَٔلُوهُمْ إِن كَانُوا۟ يَنطِقُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Qala bal faAAalahu kabeeruhum hatha faisaloohum in kanoo yantiqoona

translations.en_sahih: He said, "Rather, this - the largest of them - did it, so ask them, if they should [be able to] speak."
translations.en_yusufali: He said: "Nay, this was done by - this is their biggest one! ask them, if they can speak intelligently!"
translations.ms_basmeih: Ia menjawab: "(Tidak) bahkan yang melakukannya ialah (berhala) yang besar di antara mereka ini! Maka bertanyalah kamu kepada mereka kalau-kalau mereka dapat berkata-kata".

ayahs.arabic: فَرَجَعُوٓا۟ إِلَىٰٓ أَنفُسِهِمْ فَقَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّكُمْ أَنتُمُ ٱلظَّـٰلِمُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: FarajaAAoo ila anfusihim faqaloo innakum antumu alththalimoona

translations.en_sahih: So they returned to [blaming] themselves and said [to each other], "Indeed, you are the wrongdoers."
translations.en_yusufali: So they turned to themselves and said, "Surely ye are the ones in the wrong!"
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka mereka (penyembah berhala) kembali kepada diri mereka (memikirkan hal itu) lalu berkata (sesama sendiri): "Sesungguhnya kamulah sendiri orang-orang yang zalim".

ayahs.arabic: ثُمَّ نُكِسُوا۟ عَلَىٰ رُءُوسِهِمْ لَقَدْ عَلِمْتَ مَا هَـٰٓؤُلَآءِ يَنطِقُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Thumma nukisoo AAala ruoosihim laqad AAalimta ma haolai yantiqoona

translations.en_sahih: Then they reversed themselves, [saying], "You have already known that these do not speak!"
translations.en_yusufali: Then were they confounded with shame: (they said), "Thou knowest full well that these (idols) do not speak!"
translations.ms_basmeih: Kemudian mereka terbalik fikirannya kepada kesesatan, lalu berkata: "Sesungguhnya engkau (hai Ibrahim), telah sedia mengetahui bahawa berhala-berhala itu tidak dapat berkata-kata (maka betapa engkau menyuruh kami bertanya kepadanya)?"

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ أَفَتَعْبُدُونَ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ مَا لَا يَنفَعُكُمْ شَيْـًٔا وَلَا يَضُرُّكُمْ
ayahs.transliteration: Qala afataAAbudoona min dooni Allahi ma la yanfaAAukum shayan wala yadurrukum

translations.en_sahih: He said, "Then do you worship instead of Allah that which does not benefit you at all or harm you?
translations.en_yusufali: (Abraham) said, "Do ye then worship, besides Allah, things that can neither be of any good to you nor do you harm?
translations.ms_basmeih: Nabi Ibrahim berkata: "Jika demikian, patutkah kamu menyembah yang lain dari Allah sesuatu yang tidak dapat mendatangkan faedah sedikitpun kepada kamu, dan juga tidak dapat mendatangkan mudarat kepada kamu?

ayahs.arabic: أُفٍّ لَّكُمْ وَلِمَا تَعْبُدُونَ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ ۖ أَفَلَا تَعْقِلُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Offin lakum walima taAAbudoona min dooni Allahi afala taAAqiloona

translations.en_sahih: Uff to you and to what you worship instead of Allah. Then will you not use reason?"
translations.en_yusufali: "Fie upon you, and upon the things that ye worship besides Allah! Have ye no sense?"..
translations.ms_basmeih: "Jijik perasaanku terhadap kamu dan apa yang kamu sembah selain Allah! Maka mengapa kamu tidak mahu menggunakan akal fikiran kamu?"

ayahs.arabic: قَالُوا۟ حَرِّقُوهُ وَٱنصُرُوٓا۟ ءَالِهَتَكُمْ إِن كُنتُمْ فَـٰعِلِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Qaloo harriqoohu waonsuroo alihatakum in kuntum faAAileena

translations.en_sahih: They said, "Burn him and support your gods - if you are to act."
translations.en_yusufali: They said, "Burn him and protect your gods, If ye do (anything at all)!"
translations.ms_basmeih: (Setelah tidak dapat berhujah lagi, ketua-ketua) mereka berkata: "Bakarlah dia dan belalah tuhan-tuhan kamu, jika betul kamu mahu bertindak membelanya!"

ayahs.arabic: قُلْنَا يَـٰنَارُ كُونِى بَرْدًا وَسَلَـٰمًا عَلَىٰٓ إِبْرَٰهِيمَ
ayahs.transliteration: Qulna ya naru koonee bardan wasalaman AAala ibraheema

translations.en_sahih: Allah said, "O fire, be coolness and safety upon Abraham."
translations.en_yusufali: We said, "O Fire! be thou cool, and (a means of) safety for Abraham!"
translations.ms_basmeih: Kami berfirman: "Hai api, jadilah engkau sejuk serta selamat sejahtera kepada Ibrahim! ".

ayahs.arabic: وَأَرَادُوا۟ بِهِۦ كَيْدًا فَجَعَلْنَـٰهُمُ ٱلْأَخْسَرِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Waaradoo bihi kaydan fajaAAalnahumu alakhsareena

translations.en_sahih: And they intended for him harm, but We made them the greatest losers.
translations.en_yusufali: Then they sought a stratagem against him: but We made them the ones that lost most!
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan mereka (dengan perbuatan membakarnya itu) hendak melakukan angkara yang menyakitinya, lalu Kami jadikan mereka orang-orang yang amat rugi, (kalah dengan hinanya).

ayahs.arabic: وَنَجَّيْنَـٰهُ وَلُوطًا إِلَى ٱلْأَرْضِ ٱلَّتِى بَـٰرَكْنَا فِيهَا لِلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wanajjaynahu walootan ila alardi allatee barakna feeha lilAAalameena

translations.en_sahih: And We delivered him and Lot to the land which We had blessed for the worlds.
translations.en_yusufali: But We delivered him and (his nephew) Lut (and directed them) to the land which We have blessed for the nations.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan Kami selamatkan dia dan (sepupunya) Nabi Lut ke negeri yang Kami limpahkan berkat padanya untuk umat manusia.

ayahs.arabic: وَوَهَبْنَا لَهُۥٓ إِسْحَـٰقَ وَيَعْقُوبَ نَافِلَةً ۖ وَكُلًّا جَعَلْنَا صَـٰلِحِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wawahabna lahu ishaqa wayaAAqooba nafilatan wakullan jaAAalna saliheena

translations.en_sahih: And We gave him Isaac and Jacob in addition, and all [of them] We made righteous.
translations.en_yusufali: And We bestowed on him Isaac and, as an additional gift, (a grandson), Jacob, and We made righteous men of every one (of them).
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan Kami kurniakan kepadanya: Ishak (anaknya), dan Yaakub (cucunya) sebagai tambahan; dan tiap-tiap seorang (dari mereka) Kami jadikan orang yang soleh.

ayahs.arabic: وَجَعَلْنَـٰهُمْ أَئِمَّةً يَهْدُونَ بِأَمْرِنَا وَأَوْحَيْنَآ إِلَيْهِمْ فِعْلَ ٱلْخَيْرَٰتِ وَإِقَامَ ٱلصَّلَوٰةِ وَإِيتَآءَ ٱلزَّكَوٰةِ ۖ وَكَانُوا۟ لَنَا عَـٰبِدِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: WajaAAalnahum aimmatan yahdoona biamrina waawhayna ilayhim fiAAla alkhayrati waiqama alssalati waeetaa alzzakati wakanoo lana AAabideena

translations.en_sahih: And We made them leaders guiding by Our command. And We inspired to them the doing of good deeds, establishment of prayer, and giving of zakah; and they were worshippers of Us.
translations.en_yusufali: And We made them leaders, guiding (men) by Our Command, and We sent them inspiration to do good deeds, to establish regular prayers, and to practise regular charity; and they constantly served Us (and Us only).
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan Kami jadikan mereka ketua-ketua ikutan, yang memimpin (manusia ke jalan yang benar) dengan perintah Kami, dan Kami wahyukan kepada mereka mengerjakan kebaikan, dan mendirikan sembahyang, serta memberi zakat; dan mereka pula sentiasa beribadat kepada Kami.

ayahs.arabic: وَلُوطًا ءَاتَيْنَـٰهُ حُكْمًا وَعِلْمًا وَنَجَّيْنَـٰهُ مِنَ ٱلْقَرْيَةِ ٱلَّتِى كَانَت تَّعْمَلُ ٱلْخَبَـٰٓئِثَ ۗ إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ قَوْمَ سَوْءٍ فَـٰسِقِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Walootan ataynahu hukman waAAilman wanajjaynahu mina alqaryati allatee kanat taAAmalu alkhabaitha innahum kanoo qawma sawin fasiqeena

translations.en_sahih: And to Lot We gave judgement and knowledge, and We saved him from the city that was committing wicked deeds. Indeed, they were a people of evil, defiantly disobedient.
translations.en_yusufali: And to Lut, too, We gave Judgment and Knowledge, and We saved him from the town which practised abominations: truly they were a people given to Evil, a rebellious people.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan kepada Nabi Lut, Kami berikan hikmat kebijaksanaan dan ilmu; dan Kami selamatkan dia dari bandar yang penduduknya selalu melakukan perkara-perkara yang keji; sesungguhnya mereka itu adalah kaum jahat, yang fasik, derhaka.

ayahs.arabic: وَأَدْخَلْنَـٰهُ فِى رَحْمَتِنَآ ۖ إِنَّهُۥ مِنَ ٱلصَّـٰلِحِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Waadkhalnahu fee rahmatina innahu mina alssaliheena

translations.en_sahih: And We admitted him into Our mercy. Indeed, he was of the righteous.
translations.en_yusufali: And We admitted him to Our Mercy: for he was one of the Righteous.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan Kami masukkan Nabi Lut dalam (kumpulan mereka yang dilimpahi) rahmat Kami; sesungguhnya dia dari orang-orang yang soleh.

ayahs.arabic: وَنُوحًا إِذْ نَادَىٰ مِن قَبْلُ فَٱسْتَجَبْنَا لَهُۥ فَنَجَّيْنَـٰهُ وَأَهْلَهُۥ مِنَ ٱلْكَرْبِ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
ayahs.transliteration: Wanoohan ith nada min qablu faistajabna lahu fanajjaynahu waahlahu mina alkarbi alAAatheemi

translations.en_sahih: And [mention] Noah, when he called [to Allah] before [that time], so We responded to him and saved him and his family from the great flood.
translations.en_yusufali: (Remember) Noah, when he cried (to Us) aforetime: We listened to his (prayer) and delivered him and his family from great distress.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan (sebutkanlah peristiwa) Nabi Nuh, ketika ia menyeru (berdoa kepada Kami) sebelum (Nabi-nabi yang tersebut) itu, lalu Kami perkenankan doanya serta Kami selamatkan dia dan pengikut-pengikutnya dari kesusahan yang besar.

ayahs.arabic: وَنَصَرْنَـٰهُ مِنَ ٱلْقَوْمِ ٱلَّذِينَ كَذَّبُوا۟ بِـَٔايَـٰتِنَآ ۚ إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ قَوْمَ سَوْءٍ فَأَغْرَقْنَـٰهُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wanasarnahu mina alqawmi allatheena kaththaboo biayatina innahum kanoo qawma sawin faaghraqnahum ajmaAAeena

translations.en_sahih: And We saved him from the people who denied Our signs. Indeed, they were a people of evil, so We drowned them, all together.
translations.en_yusufali: We helped him against people who rejected Our Signs: truly they were a people given to Evil: so We drowned them (in the Flood) all together.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan Kami membelanya dari angkara kaum yang mendustakan ayat-ayat Kami; sesungguhnya adalah mereka kaum yang jahat; lalu Kami tenggelamkan mereka semuanya (sehingga mati lemas dengan taufan).

ayahs.arabic: وَدَاوُۥدَ وَسُلَيْمَـٰنَ إِذْ يَحْكُمَانِ فِى ٱلْحَرْثِ إِذْ نَفَشَتْ فِيهِ غَنَمُ ٱلْقَوْمِ وَكُنَّا لِحُكْمِهِمْ شَـٰهِدِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wadawooda wasulaymana ith yahkumani fee alharthi ith nafashat feehi ghanamu alqawmi wakunna lihukmihim shahideena

translations.en_sahih: And [mention] David and Solomon, when they judged concerning the field - when the sheep of a people overran it [at night], and We were witness to their judgement.
translations.en_yusufali: And remember David and Solomon, when they gave judgment in the matter of the field into which the sheep of certain people had strayed by night: We did witness their judgment.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan (sebutkanlah peristiwa) Nabi Daud dengan Nabi Sulaiman, ketika mereka berdua menghukum mengenai tanaman-tanaman semasa ia dirosakkan oleh kambing kaumnya pada waktu malam; dan sememangnya Kamilah yang memerhati dan mengesahkan hukuman mereka.

ayahs.arabic: فَفَهَّمْنَـٰهَا سُلَيْمَـٰنَ ۚ وَكُلًّا ءَاتَيْنَا حُكْمًا وَعِلْمًا ۚ وَسَخَّرْنَا مَعَ دَاوُۥدَ ٱلْجِبَالَ يُسَبِّحْنَ وَٱلطَّيْرَ ۚ وَكُنَّا فَـٰعِلِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Fafahhamnaha sulaymana wakullan atayna hukman waAAilman wasakhkharna maAAa dawooda aljibala yusabbihna waalttayra wakunna faAAileena

translations.en_sahih: And We gave understanding of the case to Solomon, and to each [of them] We gave judgement and knowledge. And We subjected the mountains to exalt [Us], along with David and [also] the birds. And We were doing [that].
translations.en_yusufali: To Solomon We inspired the (right) understanding of the matter: to each (of them) We gave Judgment and Knowledge; it was Our power that made the hills and the birds celebrate Our praises, with David: it was We Who did (all these things).
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka Kami beri Nabi Sulaiman memahami hukum yang lebih tepat bagi masalah itu; dan masing-masing (dari mereka berdua) Kami berikan hikmat kebijaksanaan dan ilmu (yang banyak); dan Kami mudahkan gunung-ganang dan unggas memuji Kami bersama-sama dengan Nabi Daud; dan adalah Kami berkuasa melakukan semuanya itu.

ayahs.arabic: وَعَلَّمْنَـٰهُ صَنْعَةَ لَبُوسٍ لَّكُمْ لِتُحْصِنَكُم مِّنۢ بَأْسِكُمْ ۖ فَهَلْ أَنتُمْ شَـٰكِرُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: WaAAallamnahu sanAAata laboosin lakum lituhsinakum min basikum fahal antum shakiroona

translations.en_sahih: And We taught him the fashioning of coats of armor to protect you from your [enemy in] battle. So will you then be grateful?
translations.en_yusufali: It was We Who taught him the making of coats of mail for your benefit, to guard you from each other's violence: will ye then be grateful?
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan Kami mengajar Nabi Daud membuat baju-baju besi untuk kamu, untuk menjaga keselamatan kamu dalam mana-mana peperangan kamu, maka adakah kamu sentiasa bersyukur?

ayahs.arabic: وَلِسُلَيْمَـٰنَ ٱلرِّيحَ عَاصِفَةً تَجْرِى بِأَمْرِهِۦٓ إِلَى ٱلْأَرْضِ ٱلَّتِى بَـٰرَكْنَا فِيهَا ۚ وَكُنَّا بِكُلِّ شَىْءٍ عَـٰلِمِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Walisulaymana alrreeha AAasifatan tajree biamrihi ila alardi allatee barakna feeha wakunna bikulli shayin AAalimeena

translations.en_sahih: And to Solomon [We subjected] the wind, blowing forcefully, proceeding by his command toward the land which We had blessed. And We are ever, of all things, Knowing.
translations.en_yusufali: (It was Our power that made) the violent (unruly) wind flow (tamely) for Solomon, to his order, to the land which We had blessed: for We do know all things.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan (Kami mudahkan) bagi Nabi Sulaiman angin yang kencang tiupannya, bertiup menurut kehendaknya ke negeri yang Kami limpahi berkat padanya; dan adalah Kami mengetahui akan tiap-tiap sesuatu.

ayahs.arabic: وَمِنَ ٱلشَّيَـٰطِينِ مَن يَغُوصُونَ لَهُۥ وَيَعْمَلُونَ عَمَلًا دُونَ ذَٰلِكَ ۖ وَكُنَّا لَهُمْ حَـٰفِظِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wamina alshshayateeni man yaghoosoona lahu wayaAAmaloona AAamalan doona thalika wakunna lahum hafitheena

translations.en_sahih: And of the devils were those who dived for him and did work other than that. And We were of them a guardian.
translations.en_yusufali: And of the evil ones, were some who dived for him, and did other work besides; and it was We Who guarded them.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan (Kami mudahkan) sebahagian dari Syaitan-syaitan untuk menyelam baginya, serta melakukan kerja-kerja yang lain dari itu; dan adalah Kami mengawal mereka (daripada melanggar perintahnya).

ayahs.arabic: ۞ وَأَيُّوبَ إِذْ نَادَىٰ رَبَّهُۥٓ أَنِّى مَسَّنِىَ ٱلضُّرُّ وَأَنتَ أَرْحَمُ ٱلرَّٰحِمِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Waayyooba ith nada rabbahu annee massaniya alddurru waanta arhamu alrrahimeena

translations.en_sahih: And [mention] Job, when he called to his Lord, "Indeed, adversity has touched me, and you are the Most Merciful of the merciful."
translations.en_yusufali: And (remember) Job, when He cried to his Lord, "Truly distress has seized me, but Thou art the Most Merciful of those that are merciful."
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan (sebutkanlah peristiwa) Nabi Ayub, ketika ia berdoa merayu kepada Tuhannya dengan berkata: "Sesungguhnya aku ditimpa penyakit, sedang Engkaulah sahaja yang lebih mengasihani daripada segala (yang lain) yang mengasihani".

ayahs.arabic: فَٱسْتَجَبْنَا لَهُۥ فَكَشَفْنَا مَا بِهِۦ مِن ضُرٍّ ۖ وَءَاتَيْنَـٰهُ أَهْلَهُۥ وَمِثْلَهُم مَّعَهُمْ رَحْمَةً مِّنْ عِندِنَا وَذِكْرَىٰ لِلْعَـٰبِدِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Faistajabna lahu fakashafna ma bihi min durrin waataynahu ahlahu wamithlahum maAAahum rahmatan min AAindina wathikra lilAAabideena

translations.en_sahih: So We responded to him and removed what afflicted him of adversity. And We gave him [back] his family and the like thereof with them as mercy from Us and a reminder for the worshippers [of Allah].
translations.en_yusufali: So We listened to him: We removed the distress that was on him, and We restored his people to him, and doubled their number,- as a Grace from Ourselves, and a thing for commemoration, for all who serve Us.
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka Kami perkenankan doa permohonannya, lalu Kami hapuskan penyakit yang menimpanya, serta Kami kurniakan kepadanya: keluarganya, dengan seganda lagi ramainya, sebagai satu rahmat dari Kami dan sebagai satu peringatan bagi orang-orang yang taat kepada Kami (supaya bersabar dan mendapat balasan baik).

ayahs.arabic: وَإِسْمَـٰعِيلَ وَإِدْرِيسَ وَذَا ٱلْكِفْلِ ۖ كُلٌّ مِّنَ ٱلصَّـٰبِرِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: WaismaAAeela waidreesa watha alkifli kullun mina alssabireena

translations.en_sahih: And [mention] Ishmael and Idrees and Dhul-Kifl; all were of the patient.
translations.en_yusufali: And (remember) Isma'il, Idris, and Zul-kifl, all (men) of constancy and patience;
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan (demikianlah pula) Nabi-nabi Ismail dan Idris serta Zul-Kifli; semuanya adalah dari orang-orang yang sabar.

ayahs.arabic: وَأَدْخَلْنَـٰهُمْ فِى رَحْمَتِنَآ ۖ إِنَّهُم مِّنَ ٱلصَّـٰلِحِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Waadkhalnahum fee rahmatina innahum mina alssaliheena

translations.en_sahih: And We admitted them into Our mercy. Indeed, they were of the righteous.
translations.en_yusufali: We admitted them to Our mercy: for they were of the righteous ones.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan Kami masukkan mereka dalam (kumpulan yang dilimpahi) rahmat Kami: sesungguhnya mereka adalah dari orang-orang yang soleh.

ayahs.arabic: وَذَا ٱلنُّونِ إِذ ذَّهَبَ مُغَـٰضِبًا فَظَنَّ أَن لَّن نَّقْدِرَ عَلَيْهِ فَنَادَىٰ فِى ٱلظُّلُمَـٰتِ أَن لَّآ إِلَـٰهَ إِلَّآ أَنتَ سُبْحَـٰنَكَ إِنِّى كُنتُ مِنَ ٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Watha alnnooni ith thahaba mughadiban fathanna an lan naqdira AAalayhi fanada fee alththulumati an la ilaha illa anta subhanaka innee kuntu mina alththalimeena

translations.en_sahih: And [mention] the man of the fish, when he went off in anger and thought that We would not decree [anything] upon him. And he called out within the darknesses, "There is no deity except You; exalted are You. Indeed, I have been of the wrongdoers."
translations.en_yusufali: And remember Zun-nun, when he departed in wrath: He imagined that We had no power over him! But he cried through the deptHs of darkness, "There is no god but thou: glory to thee: I was indeed wrong!"
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan (sebutkanlah peristiwa) Zun-Nun, ketika ia pergi (meninggalkan kaumnya) dalam keadaan marah, yang menyebabkan ia menyangka bahawa Kami tidak akan mengenakannya kesusahan atau cubaan; (setelah berlaku kepadanya apa yang berlaku) maka ia pun menyeru dalam keadaan yang gelap-gelita dengan berkata: "Sesungguhnya tiada Tuhan (yang dapat menolong) melainkan Engkau (ya Allah)! Maha Suci Engkau (daripada melakukan aniaya, tolongkanlah daku)! Sesungguhnya aku adalah dari orang-orang yang menganiaya diri sendiri".

ayahs.arabic: فَٱسْتَجَبْنَا لَهُۥ وَنَجَّيْنَـٰهُ مِنَ ٱلْغَمِّ ۚ وَكَذَٰلِكَ نُـۨجِى ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Faistajabna lahu wanajjaynahu mina alghammi wakathalika nunjee almumineena

translations.en_sahih: So We responded to him and saved him from the distress. And thus do We save the believers.
translations.en_yusufali: So We listened to him: and delivered him from distress: and thus do We deliver those who have faith.
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka Kami kabulkan permohonan doanya, dan Kami selamatkan dia dari kesusahan yang menyelubunginya; dan sebagaimana Kami menyelamatkannya Kami akan selamatkan orang-orang yang beriman (ketika mereka merayu kepada Kami).

ayahs.arabic: وَزَكَرِيَّآ إِذْ نَادَىٰ رَبَّهُۥ رَبِّ لَا تَذَرْنِى فَرْدًا وَأَنتَ خَيْرُ ٱلْوَٰرِثِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wazakariyya ith nada rabbahu rabbi la tatharnee fardan waanta khayru alwaritheena

translations.en_sahih: And [mention] Zechariah, when he called to his Lord, "My Lord, do not leave me alone [with no heir], while you are the best of inheritors."
translations.en_yusufali: And (remember) Zakariya, when he cried to his Lord: "O my Lord! leave me not without offspring, though thou art the best of inheritors."
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan (sebutkanlah peristiwa) Nabi Zakaria, ketika ia merayu kepada Tuhannya dengan berkata: "Wahai Tuhanku! Janganlah Engkau biarkan daku seorang diri (dengan tidak meninggalkan zuriat); dan Engkaulah jua sebaik-baik yang mewarisi".

ayahs.arabic: فَٱسْتَجَبْنَا لَهُۥ وَوَهَبْنَا لَهُۥ يَحْيَىٰ وَأَصْلَحْنَا لَهُۥ زَوْجَهُۥٓ ۚ إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ يُسَـٰرِعُونَ فِى ٱلْخَيْرَٰتِ وَيَدْعُونَنَا رَغَبًا وَرَهَبًا ۖ وَكَانُوا۟ لَنَا خَـٰشِعِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Faistajabna lahu wawahabna lahu yahya waaslahna lahu zawjahu innahum kanoo yusariAAoona fee alkhayrati wayadAAoonana raghaban warahaban wakanoo lana khashiAAeena

translations.en_sahih: So We responded to him, and We gave to him John, and amended for him his wife. Indeed, they used to hasten to good deeds and supplicate Us in hope and fear, and they were to Us humbly submissive.
translations.en_yusufali: So We listened to him: and We granted him Yahya: We cured his wife's (Barrenness) for him. These (three) were ever quick in emulation in good works; they used to call on Us with love and reverence, and humble themselves before Us.
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka Kami perkenankan doanya, dan Kami kurniakan kepadanya (anaknya) Yahya, dan Kami perelokkan keadaan isterinya yang mandul, (untuk melahirkan anak) baginya. (Kami limpahkan berbagai ihsan kepada Rasul-rasul itu ialah kerana) sesungguhnya mereka sentiasa berlumba-lumba dalam mengerjakan kebaikan, dan sentiasa berdoa kepada kami dengan penuh harapan serta gerun takut; dan mereka pula sentiasa khusyuk (dan taat) kepada Kami.

ayahs.arabic: وَٱلَّتِىٓ أَحْصَنَتْ فَرْجَهَا فَنَفَخْنَا فِيهَا مِن رُّوحِنَا وَجَعَلْنَـٰهَا وَٱبْنَهَآ ءَايَةً لِّلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Waallatee ahsanat farjaha fanafakhna feeha min roohina wajaAAalnaha waibnaha ayatan lilAAalameena

translations.en_sahih: And [mention] the one who guarded her chastity, so We blew into her [garment] through Our angel [Gabriel], and We made her and her son a sign for the worlds.
translations.en_yusufali: And (remember) her who guarded her chastity: We breathed into her of Our spirit, and We made her and her son a sign for all peoples.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan (sebutkanlah peristiwa) perempuan yang telah menjaga kehormatan dan kesuciannya; lalu Kami tiupkan padanya dari Roh (ciptaan) Kami, dan Kami jadikan dia dan anaknya sebagai satu tanda (yang menunjukkan kekuasaan Kami) bagi umat manusia.

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّ هَـٰذِهِۦٓ أُمَّتُكُمْ أُمَّةً وَٰحِدَةً وَأَنَا۠ رَبُّكُمْ فَٱعْبُدُونِ
ayahs.transliteration: Inna hathihi ommatukum ommatan wahidatan waana rabbukum faoAAbudooni

translations.en_sahih: Indeed this, your religion, is one religion, and I am your Lord, so worship Me.
translations.en_yusufali: Verily, this brotherhood of yours is a single brotherhood, and I am your Lord and Cherisher: therefore serve Me (and no other).
translations.ms_basmeih: Sesungguhnya ugama Islam inilah ugama kamu, ugama yang satu asas pokoknya, dan Akulah Tuhan kamu; maka sembahlah kamu akan Daku.

ayahs.arabic: وَتَقَطَّعُوٓا۟ أَمْرَهُم بَيْنَهُمْ ۖ كُلٌّ إِلَيْنَا رَٰجِعُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: WataqattaAAoo amrahum baynahum kullun ilayna rajiAAoona

translations.en_sahih: And [yet] they divided their affair among themselves, [but] all to Us will return.
translations.en_yusufali: But (later generations) cut off their affair (of unity), one from another: (yet) will they all return to Us.
translations.ms_basmeih: (Kebanyakan manusia masih berselisihan) dan berpecah-belah dalam urusan ugama mereka; (ingatlah) mereka semuanya akan kembali kepada kami (untuk menerima balasan).

ayahs.arabic: فَمَن يَعْمَلْ مِنَ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَـٰتِ وَهُوَ مُؤْمِنٌ فَلَا كُفْرَانَ لِسَعْيِهِۦ وَإِنَّا لَهُۥ كَـٰتِبُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Faman yaAAmal mina alssalihati wahuwa muminun fala kufrana lisaAAyihi wainna lahu katiboona

translations.en_sahih: So whoever does righteous deeds while he is a believer - no denial will there be for his effort, and indeed We, of it, are recorders.
translations.en_yusufali: Whoever works any act of righteousness and has faith,- His endeavour will not be rejected: We shall record it in his favour.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dengan yang demikian, sesiapa yang mengerjakan sesuatu amal kebaikan, sedang ia beriman, maka tidaklah disia-siakan amal usahanya; dan sesungguhnya Kami tetap menulisnya.

ayahs.arabic: وَحَرَٰمٌ عَلَىٰ قَرْيَةٍ أَهْلَكْنَـٰهَآ أَنَّهُمْ لَا يَرْجِعُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Waharamun AAala qaryatin ahlaknaha annahum la yarjiAAoona

translations.en_sahih: And there is prohibition upon [the people of] a city which We have destroyed that they will [ever] return
translations.en_yusufali: But there is a ban on any population which We have destroyed: that they shall not return,
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan mustahil kepada penduduk sesebuah negeri yang Kami binasakan, bahawa mereka tidak akan kembali (kepada Kami untuk menerima balasan di akhirat kelak).

ayahs.arabic: حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا فُتِحَتْ يَأْجُوجُ وَمَأْجُوجُ وَهُم مِّن كُلِّ حَدَبٍ يَنسِلُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Hatta itha futihat yajooju wamajooju wahum min kulli hadabin yansiloona

translations.en_sahih: Until when [the dam of] Gog and Magog has been opened and they, from every elevation, descend
translations.en_yusufali: Until the Gog and Magog (people) are let through (their barrier), and they swiftly swarm from every hill.
translations.ms_basmeih: (Demikianlah keadaan mereka) hingga apabila terbuka tembok yang menyekat Yakjuj dan Makjuj, serta mereka meluru turun dari tiap-tiap tempat yang tinggi.

ayahs.arabic: وَٱقْتَرَبَ ٱلْوَعْدُ ٱلْحَقُّ فَإِذَا هِىَ شَـٰخِصَةٌ أَبْصَـٰرُ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ يَـٰوَيْلَنَا قَدْ كُنَّا فِى غَفْلَةٍ مِّنْ هَـٰذَا بَلْ كُنَّا ظَـٰلِمِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Waiqtaraba alwaAAdu alhaqqu faitha hiya shakhisatun absaru allatheena kafaroo ya waylana qad kunna fee ghaflatin min hatha bal kunna thalimeena

translations.en_sahih: And [when] the true promise has approached; then suddenly the eyes of those who disbelieved will be staring [in horror, while they say], "O woe to us; we had been unmindful of this; rather, we were wrongdoers."
translations.en_yusufali: Then will the true promise draw nigh (of fulfilment): then behold! the eyes of the Unbelievers will fixedly stare in horror: "Ah! Woe to us! we were indeed heedless of this; nay, we truly did wrong!"
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan hampirlah datangnya janji hari kiamat yang benar, maka dengan serta-merta pandangan mata orang-orang yang kufur ingkar terbeliak (sambil berkata dengan cemas): "Aduhai celakanya Kami. Sesungguhnya kami telah tinggal dalam keadaan yang melalaikan kami daripada memikirkan perkara ini, bahkan kami telah menjadi orang-orang yang menganiaya diri sendiri".

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّكُمْ وَمَا تَعْبُدُونَ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ حَصَبُ جَهَنَّمَ أَنتُمْ لَهَا وَٰرِدُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Innakum wama taAAbudoona min dooni Allahi hasabu jahannama antum laha waridoona

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, you [disbelievers] and what you worship other than Allah are the firewood of Hell. You will be coming to [enter] it.
translations.en_yusufali: Verily ye, (unbelievers), and the (false) gods that ye worship besides Allah, are (but) fuel for Hell! to it will ye (surely) come!
translations.ms_basmeih: Sesungguhnya kamu dan apa yang kamu sembah, yang lain dari Allah, menjadi bahan-bahan bakaran yang dilimparkan ke dalam neraka Jahannam; kamu (sudah tetap) akan memasukinya.

ayahs.arabic: لَوْ كَانَ هَـٰٓؤُلَآءِ ءَالِهَةً مَّا وَرَدُوهَا ۖ وَكُلٌّ فِيهَا خَـٰلِدُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Law kana haolai alihatan ma waradooha wakullun feeha khalidoona

translations.en_sahih: Had these [false deities] been [actual] gods, they would not have come to it, but all are eternal therein.
translations.en_yusufali: If these had been gods, they would not have got there! but each one will abide therein.
translations.ms_basmeih: Kalaulah mereka (yang kamu sembah) itu tuhan-tuhan, tentulah mereka tidak masuk ke dalam neraka; dan (ketahuilah), semuanya (yang menyembah dan yang disembah) akan kekal dalam neraka selama-lamanya.

ayahs.arabic: لَهُمْ فِيهَا زَفِيرٌ وَهُمْ فِيهَا لَا يَسْمَعُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Lahum feeha zafeerun wahum feeha la yasmaAAoona

translations.en_sahih: For them therein is heavy sighing, and they therein will not hear.
translations.en_yusufali: There, sobbing will be their lot, nor will they there hear (aught else).
translations.ms_basmeih: Mereka mendayu-dayu (kesakitan) di dalam neraka, dan mereka pula di situ tidak dapat mendengar sesuatu yang menyenangkan.

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ سَبَقَتْ لَهُم مِّنَّا ٱلْحُسْنَىٰٓ أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ عَنْهَا مُبْعَدُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Inna allatheena sabaqat lahum minna alhusna olaika AAanha mubAAadoona

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, those for whom the best [reward] has preceded from Us - they are from it far removed.
translations.en_yusufali: Those for whom the good (record) from Us has gone before, will be removed far therefrom.
translations.ms_basmeih: Sesungguhnya orang-orang yang telah tetap dari dahulu lagi memperoleh kebaikan dari Kami, mereka dijauhkan dari neraka itu.

ayahs.arabic: لَا يَسْمَعُونَ حَسِيسَهَا ۖ وَهُمْ فِى مَا ٱشْتَهَتْ أَنفُسُهُمْ خَـٰلِدُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: La yasmaAAoona haseesaha wahum fee ma ishtahat anfusuhum khalidoona

translations.en_sahih: They will not hear its sound, while they are, in that which their souls desire, abiding eternally.
translations.en_yusufali: Not the slightest sound will they hear of Hell: what their souls desired, in that will they dwell.
translations.ms_basmeih: Mereka tidak mendengar suara (julangan) api neraka itu, dan mereka akan kekal selama-lamanya di dalam (nikmat-nikmat Syurga) yang diingini oleh jiwa mereka.

ayahs.arabic: لَا يَحْزُنُهُمُ ٱلْفَزَعُ ٱلْأَكْبَرُ وَتَتَلَقَّىٰهُمُ ٱلْمَلَـٰٓئِكَةُ هَـٰذَا يَوْمُكُمُ ٱلَّذِى كُنتُمْ تُوعَدُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: La yahzunuhumu alfazaAAu alakbaru watatalaqqahumu almalaikatu hatha yawmukumu allathee kuntum tooAAadoona

translations.en_sahih: They will not be grieved by the greatest terror, and the angels will meet them, [saying], "This is your Day which you have been promised" -
translations.en_yusufali: The Great Terror will bring them no grief: but the angels will meet them (with mutual greetings): "This is your Day,- (the Day) that ye were promised."
translations.ms_basmeih: Huru-hara besar yang amat mengerikan (pada hari kiamat) itu tidak merunsingkan mereka, dan (sebaliknya) mereka disambut oleh malaikat-malaikat dengan berkata: "Inilah hari kamu (beroleh kebahagiaan), yang telah dijanjikan kepada kamu (di dunia) dahulu".

ayahs.arabic: يَوْمَ نَطْوِى ٱلسَّمَآءَ كَطَىِّ ٱلسِّجِلِّ لِلْكُتُبِ ۚ كَمَا بَدَأْنَآ أَوَّلَ خَلْقٍ نُّعِيدُهُۥ ۚ وَعْدًا عَلَيْنَآ ۚ إِنَّا كُنَّا فَـٰعِلِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Yawma natwee alssamaa katayyi alssijlli lilkutubi kama badana awwala khalqin nuAAeeduhu waAAdan AAalayna inna kunna faAAileena

translations.en_sahih: The Day when We will fold the heaven like the folding of a [written] sheet for the records. As We began the first creation, We will repeat it. [That is] a promise binding upon Us. Indeed, We will do it.
translations.en_yusufali: The Day that We roll up the heavens like a scroll rolled up for books (completed),- even as We produced the first creation, so shall We produce a new one: a promise We have undertaken: truly shall We fulfil it.
translations.ms_basmeih: (Ingatlah) hari Kami menggulung langit seperti menggulung lembaran surat catitan; sebagaimana kami mulakan wujudnya sesuatu kejadian, Kami ulangi wujudnya lagi; sebagai satu janji yang ditanggung oleh Kami; sesungguhnya Kami tetap melaksanakannya.

ayahs.arabic: وَلَقَدْ كَتَبْنَا فِى ٱلزَّبُورِ مِنۢ بَعْدِ ٱلذِّكْرِ أَنَّ ٱلْأَرْضَ يَرِثُهَا عِبَادِىَ ٱلصَّـٰلِحُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Walaqad katabna fee alzzaboori min baAAdi alththikri anna alarda yarithuha AAibadiya alssalihoona

translations.en_sahih: And We have already written in the book [of Psalms] after the [previous] mention that the land [of Paradise] is inherited by My righteous servants.
translations.en_yusufali: Before this We wrote in the Psalms, after the Message (given to Moses): My servants the righteous, shall inherit the earth."
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan demi sesungguhnya, Kami telah tulis di dalam Kitab-kitab yang Kami turunkan sesudah ada tulisannya pada Lauh Mahfuz: "Bahawasanya bumi itu akan diwarisi oleh hamba-hambaKu yang soleh".

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّ فِى هَـٰذَا لَبَلَـٰغًا لِّقَوْمٍ عَـٰبِدِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Inna fee hatha labalaghan liqawmin AAabideena

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, in this [Qur'an] is notification for a worshipping people.
translations.en_yusufali: Verily in this (Qur'an) is a Message for people who would (truly) worship Allah.
translations.ms_basmeih: Sesungguhnya Al-Quran ini mengandungi keterangan-keterangan yang cukup bagi orang-orang yang (cita-citanya) mengerjakan ibadat (kepada Allah dengan berilmu).

ayahs.arabic: وَمَآ أَرْسَلْنَـٰكَ إِلَّا رَحْمَةً لِّلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wama arsalnaka illa rahmatan lilAAalameena

translations.en_sahih: And We have not sent you, [O Muhammad], except as a mercy to the worlds.
translations.en_yusufali: We sent thee not, but as a Mercy for all creatures.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan tiadalah Kami mengutuskan engkau (wahai Muhammad), melainkan untuk menjadi rahmat bagi sekalian alam.

ayahs.arabic: قُلْ إِنَّمَا يُوحَىٰٓ إِلَىَّ أَنَّمَآ إِلَـٰهُكُمْ إِلَـٰهٌ وَٰحِدٌ ۖ فَهَلْ أَنتُم مُّسْلِمُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Qul innama yooha ilayya annama ilahukum ilahun wahidun fahal antum muslimoona

translations.en_sahih: Say, "It is only revealed to me that your god is but one God; so will you be Muslims [in submission to Him]?"
translations.en_yusufali: Say: "What has come to me by inspiration is that your Allah is One Allah: will ye therefore bow to His Will (in Islam)?"
translations.ms_basmeih: Katakanlah: "Sesungguhnya yang diwahyukan kepadaku (mengenai ketuhanan ialah) bahawa Tuhan kamu hanyalah Tuhan yang bersifat Esa, maka adakah kamu mahu menurut apa yang diwahyukan kepadaku?"

ayahs.arabic: فَإِن تَوَلَّوْا۟ فَقُلْ ءَاذَنتُكُمْ عَلَىٰ سَوَآءٍ ۖ وَإِنْ أَدْرِىٓ أَقَرِيبٌ أَم بَعِيدٌ مَّا تُوعَدُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Fain tawallaw faqul athantukum AAala sawain wain adree aqareebun am baAAeedun ma tooAAadoona

translations.en_sahih: But if they turn away, then say, "I have announced to [all of] you equally. And I know not whether near or far is that which you are promised.
translations.en_yusufali: But if they turn back, Say: "I have proclaimed the Message to you all alike and in truth; but I know not whether that which ye are promised is near or far.
translations.ms_basmeih: Sekiranya mereka berpaling ingkar maka katakanlah: "Aku telah memberitahu kepada kamu (apa yang diwahyukan kepadaku) dengan keterangan yang jelas untuk kita bersama; dan aku tidak mengetahui sama ada (balasan buruk) yang dijanjikan kerana keingkaran kamu itu, sudah dekat atau masih jauh.

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّهُۥ يَعْلَمُ ٱلْجَهْرَ مِنَ ٱلْقَوْلِ وَيَعْلَمُ مَا تَكْتُمُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Innahu yaAAlamu aljahra mina alqawli wayaAAlamu ma taktumoona

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, He knows what is declared of speech, and He knows what you conceal.
translations.en_yusufali: "It is He Who knows what is open in speech and what ye hide (in your hearts).
translations.ms_basmeih: Sesungguhnya Allah mengetahui akan perkataan yang kamu sebutkan dengan terus terang, dan juga Ia mengetahui apa yang kamu sembunyikan (di dalam hati).

ayahs.arabic: وَإِنْ أَدْرِى لَعَلَّهُۥ فِتْنَةٌ لَّكُمْ وَمَتَـٰعٌ إِلَىٰ حِينٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Wain adree laAAallahu fitnatun lakum wamataAAun ila heenin

translations.en_sahih: And I know not; perhaps it is a trial for you and enjoyment for a time."
translations.en_yusufali: "I know not but that it may be a trial for you, and a grant of (worldly) livelihood (to you) for a time."
translations.ms_basmeih: "Dan aku tidak mengetahui (mengapa dilambatkan balasan buruk yang dijanjikan kepada kamu itu) jangan-jangan lambatnya menjadi satu sebab yang menambahkan azab kamu, dan di samping itu memberi kamu kesenangan hidup hingga ke suatu masa yang tertentu".

ayahs.arabic: قَـٰلَ رَبِّ ٱحْكُم بِٱلْحَقِّ ۗ وَرَبُّنَا ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنُ ٱلْمُسْتَعَانُ عَلَىٰ مَا تَصِفُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Qala rabbi ohkum bialhaqqi warabbuna alrrahmanu almustaAAanu AAala ma tasifoona

translations.en_sahih: [The Prophet] has said, "My Lord, judge [between us] in truth. And our Lord is the Most Merciful, the one whose help is sought against that which you describe."
translations.en_yusufali: Say: "O my Lord! judge Thou in truth!" "Our Lord Most Gracious is the One Whose assistance should be sought against the blasphemies ye utter!"
translations.ms_basmeih: (Nabi Muhammad merayu dengan) berkata: "Wahai Tuhanku, hukumkanlah (di antara kami dengan mereka) dengan yang benar; dan Tuhan kami ialah Yang Melimpah-limpah rahmatNya yang dipohonkan pertolonganNya terhadap apa yang kamu sifatkan itu".
